abstract: This paper explores the philosophical foundations and ontological dimensions of TGKH. M. Zainuddin Abdul Madjid’s perspectives on Islamic boarding school education. Additionally, it examines the contemporary relevance of his educational philosophy within the broader context of the Indonesian national education system. Utilizing a qualitative descriptive methodology with a descriptive analysis approach, the study finds that TGKH. M. Zainuddin Abdul Madjid successfully transformed the educational landscape for the people of Lombok. Through the implementation of integrated pedagogical concepts and practices, he played a pivotal role in deepening the community's understanding of Islamic teachings and formalizing spiritual guidance into a functional educational framework.
